Uses of Package
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Packages that use com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff  
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension  
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope  
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.secrets  
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.util  
  • Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java used by com.github.cowwoc.requirements 
    Class Description
    ArrayValidator
    Validates the requirements of an array of elements.
    ArrayVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of an array.
    BigDecimalValidator
    Validates the requirements of a BigDecimal value.
    BigDecimalVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal value.
    BooleanValidator
    Validates the requirements of a boolean value.
    BooleanVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a boolean value.
    ClassValidator
    Validates the requirements of a Class value.
    ClassVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a Class value.
    CollectionValidator
    Validates the requirements of a Collection.
    CollectionVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a Collection.
    ComparableValidator
    Validates the requirements of a Comparable.
    ComparableVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a Comparable.
    Configuration
    Configures the behavior of a single verifier.
    FloatingPointValidator
    Validates the requirements of a floating-point number.
    FloatingPointVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a floating-point number.

    Validates the requirements of an IP address or hostname.
    InetAddressVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of an IP address or hostname.

    Validates the requirements of an integer number.
    IntegerVerifier

    OptionalVerifier

    PathVerifier
